title: Team Composition
text: Each team will comprise 4 players — 1 captain and 3 players acquired through the auction. All four members are required to play in the matches.

title: Gender Requirement
text: Every team must include a minimum of 1 and a maximum of 2 female players, with the captain counted toward this quota.

title: Purse
text: Each team will be allocated a starting purse of 20,000 tokens.

title: Base Price
text: The base price for beginner players is 2,000 tokens, and for intermediate players, 5,000 tokens.

title: Budget Discipline
text: Teams must manage their purse responsibly, ensuring sufficient funds remain to bid on all remaining players throughout the auction.

title: Bid Increment
text: All bids will increase in multiples of 500 tokens.

title: Re-auction round
text: Players who go unsold in the first round get a second chance later in the auction.

title: Auctioneer's Authority
text: The auctioneer's decision is final. Once a player is declared sold, the sale is binding and cannot be reversed.
